1026.issue: [E1026] Missing mandatory translation into de of "common.titleLang" in [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.socketio/blob/master/io-package.json).

1027.issue: [W1027] Missing suggested translation into ru,pt,nl,fr,it,es,pl,uk,zh-cn of "common.titleLang" in [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.socketio/blob/master/io-package.json).

1057.issue: [E1057] admin 5.0.0 listed as dependency but 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please update globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.socketio/blob/master/io-package.json).

1084.issue: [W1084] "common.title" is deprecated and replaced by "common.titleLang". Please remove from [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.socketio/blob/master/io-package.json).

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5010.issue: [E5010] "/admin/i18n/uk/translations.json" or "admin/i18n/uk.json" not found, but admin support is declared. Please add.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (dist/main.js, src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.socketio/blob/master/io-package.json).

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (dist/lib/socketIO.js, example/socket-client/tools.d.ts, example/socket-client/tools.js, src/lib/socketIO.ts). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

5507.issue: [E5507] missing size attributes [xs,xl] for number at admin/jsonConfig.json/items/mainTab/port

5510.issue: [E5510] responsive check: maximum issues reached, please fix reported ones and recheck

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#271] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.socketio/issues/271)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0029.issue: [E0029] Node.js 20 is required as minimum, node.js 22 is recommended. Please change "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '18' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.socketio/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.socketio/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 18. Downgrade to node.js 18.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
